genre_refs: Henry Mosler 'Birth of the Flag' (American history painting / Betsy Ross legend)
description: Reproduction of the academic oil painting 'Birth of the Flag' by Henry Mosler, posted by the U.S. Department of Labor with no added on-image text. The warmly lit interior scene depicts four women in colonial-era dress in a paneled parlor with a brick fireplace and a curtained window. A standing woman in a yellow gown and white bonnet holds up a blue canton studded with white stars (an early American flag), while three seated women in green, blue, and salmon-orange dresses stitch and arrange the red-and-white striped field of the flag spread across their laps. The painting style is realist and painterly. The tweet caption quotes George Washington's 1796 line about the 'just pride of Patriotism' and refers to 'One American Heritage'.
notable_text: (No on-image text. Caption attributes the work: 'Birth of the Flag' - Henry Mosler; 'One American Heritage'; George Washington 1796 quote)
